---
title: "Publishing eDNA Data in OBIS"
subtitle: "From sequences to a global open biodiversity record"
author: "Saara Suominen"
date: today
---

{{< include slides/_01-what-is-obis.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_02-mature-global-community.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_03-why-publish-edna.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_04-data-standard.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_05-dna-publishing-guide.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_06-five-data-categories.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_07-raw-outputs-long-format.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_08-example-transformation.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_09-key-fields-occurrence-core.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_10-key-fields-dna-extension.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_11-table-structure-options.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_12-event-core-structure-example.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_13-publishing-workflow.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_14-metabarcoding-data-toolkit.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_15-quality-control.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_16-resources-community.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_17-summary.qmd >}}
